project_title: Forecasting Demographic Changes in the Population in Vienna using Machine Learning

model.name: Vienna demographic population forecasting model
model.intended_use: The model is intended to forecast aggregated demographic population counts in Vienna using historical population statistics grouped by district, sex, age group, and nationality group.
model.out_of_scope_use: The model must not be used for individual-level prediction, legal decisions, migration policy decisions, or decisions affecting individual persons.
known_limitations: The dataset contains aggregated demographic statistics and cannot represent individual-level behaviour.
The model depends on historical demographic trends and may not capture unexpected social, political, economic, or migration-related changes.
Small demographic groups may have fewer observations and therefore less stable forecasts.
The meaning of encoded categories such as SEX and AGE5 must be documented carefully to avoid misinterpretation.

training_data.name: Population by sex, 5-year age groups and nationality since 2002 - districts of Vienna
training_data.description: The dataset contains yearly population counts for Vienna from 2002 to 2025 by district, sex, 5-year age group, and nationality group.
